description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:latest Docker image. Define a single job named run in the default test stage that updates apt and installs fortune-mod and fortunes, installs the Python package toot via pip, creates the directory ~/.config/toot/instances, writes the $TOOT_LOGIN_INFORMATION secret to ~/.config/toot/user.cfg, writes $TOOT_INSTANCE_INFORMATION to ~/.config/toot/instances/$TOOT_INSTANCE, runs toot auth, and then conditionally executes bash run.sh only if $DO_TOOT is set and toot auth succeeds (otherwise logs a message or exits with error). No services, caches, artifacts, or branch rules are required.
